name: AECOM Technology Corp.
h1: AECOM Technology's GCC footprint in India
lede: AECOM Technology runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering GBS, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AECOM Technology office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AECOM Technology Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AECOM Technology runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering GBS. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AECOM Technology's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning GBS. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 21 decision-makers, in one profile.
